content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix_skew
P: provider_skew ∧ edge_ts_valid
V: allow_skew ∧ reject_stale
A: widen_window ∧ min_fix ∧ reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix_skew.
Plan: provider_skew and edge_ts_valid.
Verify: allow_skew and reject_stale.
Answer target: widen_window and min_fix and reg_test.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: webhook_timestamp_edge_fix
C: webhook_verify ∧ "300"_skew ∧ "401"_reject ∧ provider_skew_only
P: inclusive_boundary_check ∧ min_fix ∧ reg_test_edge
V: abs_eq_300_accepts ∧ abs_gt_300_rejects ∧ no_widen_window
A: patch_comparator ∧ add_boundary_test

@flint v0 hybrid
G: stop_charge_loop
P: overdue⇒"402" ∧ grace="24h" ∧ exact_boundary ∧ no_loop
V: boundary_test ∧ regression_test ∧ loop_absent
A: patch_grace_check ∧ assert_boundary ∧ add_reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: stop_charge_loop.
Plan: overdue implies "402" and grace="24h" and exact_boundary and no_loop.
Verify: boundary_test and regression_test and loop_absent.
Answer target: patch_grace_check and assert_boundary and add_reg_test.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: min_fix
C: billing_overdue_middleware ∧ overdue=>402 ∧ grace_24h ∧ boundary_charge_loop
P: encode_grace_24h_exact ∧ fix_boundary_charge_loop ∧ add_regression_test
V: no_charge_loop ∧ "402"_after_grace ∧ regression_passes
A: patch_middleware ∧ assert_boundary_24h ∧ ship_reg_test

@flint v0 hybrid
G: choose_architecture
C: team="9" ∧ ddl="12 weeks" ∧ store="PostgreSQL" ∧ ops=platform_plus_sec ∧ traffic=steady
P: compliance_ready ∧ small_team ∧ tight_deadline
V: modular_monolith ∧ postgres_schemas ∧ clear_boundaries
A: deliver_modular_monolith ∧ why=fast_ship_compliance_fit

@flint v0 hybrid
G: compliance_ready_arch
C: team("9") ∧ ddl("12 weeks") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ steady_traffic
P: modular_monolith ∧ audit_boundaries ∧ platform_plus_sec_ops
V: fits_team_9 ∧ ships_in_12_weeks ∧ postgres_native_audit
A: default_modular_monolith ∧ postgres_audit_log ∧ short_why_compliance_fit

[AUDIT]
Goal: compliance_ready_arch.
Constraints: team("9") and deadline("12 weeks") and store("PostgreSQL") and steady_traffic.
Plan: modular_monolith and audit_boundaries and platform_plus_sec_ops.
Verify: fits_team_9 and ships_in_12_weeks and postgres_native_audit.
Answer target: default_modular_monolith and postgres_audit_log and short_why_compliance_fit.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: deliver_architecture
C: team="6" ∧ ddl="9 weeks" ∧ store="PostgreSQL" ∧ pt_mlops ∧ async_enrichment
P: worker_sidecar ∧ postgres_queue ∧ async_jobs ∧ small_team_fit
V: meets_ddl ∧ ops_simple ∧ scales_async
A: default_arch ∧ short_why

@flint v0 hybrid
G: capsule_micro_architecture
C: team="6" ∧ ddl="9 weeks" ∧ store="PostgreSQL" ∧ pt_mlops ∧ async_enrichment
P: worker_sidecar ∧ postgres_queue ∧ shared_schema_boundary
V: fits_team_6 ∧ ships_in_9_weeks ∧ no_extra_infra
A: default_arch ∧ short_why

@flint v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_risk
C: user_input ∧ "download" ∧ path_concat
P: path_traversal ∧ ".." ∧ arbitrary_file_read
V: reject_".." ∧ resolve_path ∧ verify_within_baseDir
A: sanitize_input ∧ use_path_join ∧ enforce_allowlist

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_risk.
Constraints: user_input and "download" and path_concat.
Plan: path_traversal and ".." and arbitrary_file_read.
Verify: reject_".." and resolve_path and verify_within_baseDir.
Answer target: sanitize_input and use_path_join and enforce_allowlist.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: safe_file_download
C: ".."∧"download"∧file_download_handler∧path_traversal_risk
P: reject_".."∧normalize_path∧whitelist_basedir
V: path_within_baseDir∧no_".."_after_normalize∧"download"_only_allowed_files
A: reject_traversal∧sanitize_input∧audit_access

@flint v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_sql_injection
C: "SELECT" ∧ "sort" ∧ user_input_concat ∧ order_by_clause
P: whitelist_sort_columns ∧ parameterize_query ∧ reject_unknown_keys
V: static_scan_clean ∧ injection_test_blocked ∧ valid_sort_works
A: patch_endpoint ∧ add_tests ∧ audit_invoice_admin_api

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_sql_injection.
Constraints: "SELECT" and "sort" and user_input_concat and order_by_clause.
Plan: whitelist_sort_columns and parameterize_query and reject_unknown_keys.
Verify: static_scan_clean and injection_test_blocked and valid_sort_works.
Answer target: patch_endpoint and add_tests and audit_invoice_admin_api.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: sql_injection_risk
C: "sort" ∧ "SELECT" ∧ invoice_admin_api ∧ string_concat_query
P: unsanitized_input_concat ∧ order_by_clause_tainted ∧ admin_data_exposure
V: whitelist_sort_column ∧ parameterize_or_validate ∧ reject_unknown_keys
A: run_injection_test ∧ assert_sort_whitelist ∧ log_rejected_inputs

[AUDIT]
Goal: sql_injection_risk.
Constraints: "sort" and "SELECT" and invoice_admin_api and string_concat_query.
Plan: unsanitized_input_concat and order_by_clause_tainted and admin_data_exposure.
Verify: whitelist_sort_column and parameterize_or_validate and reject_unknown_keys.
Answer target: run_injection_test and assert_sort_whitelist and log_rejected_inputs.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor_reconcileBatch
C: has_reconcileBatch ∧ order_load_batch>db.fetchRows>apply_rules>db.save>emit_metrics
P: use_"async" ∧ use_"await" ∧ db_err_"next(err)" ∧ minimal_change
V: order_preserved ∧ anchors_present ∧ behavior_unchanged
A: convert_to_async_await ∧ await_db.fetchRows ∧ await_db.save ∧ try_catch_next(err) ∧ keep_emit_metrics

@flint v0 hybrid
G: minimal_async_await
C: async∧await∧"next(err)"
P: reconcileBatch∧load_batch>db.fetchRows>apply_rules>db.save>emit_metrics∧minimal_change
V: db_err→"next(err)"∧preserve_order∧async_await_only
A: refactor(reconcileBatch)∧wrap_db_calls(await)∧forward_errors("next(err)")

[AUDIT]
Goal: minimal async/await migration.
Constraints: async and await and "next(err)".
Plan: reconcileBatch and load_batch>db.fetchRows>apply_rules>db.save>emit_metrics and minimal_change.
Verify: db_err then "next(err)" and preserve_order and async_await_only.
Answer target: refactor(reconcileBatch) and wrap_db_calls(await) and forward_errors("next(err)").

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor_loadGatewayUser
C: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ "next(err)" ∧ minimal_change
P: session_check ∧ db.findUser ∧ flags.load ∧ audit.log ∧ next
V: order_preserved ∧ db_err_via_next ∧ anchors_verbatim
A: convert_async ∧ await_calls ∧ try_catch ∧ "next(err)" ∧ call_next

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor_loadGatewayUser.
Constraints: "async" and "await" and "next(err)" and minimal_change.
Plan: session_check and db.findUser and flags.load and audit.log and next.
Verify: order_preserved and db_err_via_next and anchors_verbatim.
Answer target: convert_async and await_calls and try_catch and "next(err)" and call_next.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: minimal_async_await_refactor
C: target("loadGatewayUser") ∧ anchors("async"|"await"|"next(err)") ∧ order(session_check>db.findUser>flags.load>audit.log>next)
P: async_await ∧ await_each_step ∧ try_catch_next(err) ∧ minimal_change
V: order_preserved ∧ db_err→next(err) ∧ anchors_verbatim
A: emit_refactor ∧ no_logic_drift ∧ stop

[AUDIT]
Goal: minimal_async_await_refactor.
Constraints: target("loadGatewayUser") and anchors("async" or "await" or "next(err)") and order(session_check>db.findUser>flags.load>audit.log>next).
Plan: async/await and await_each_step and try_catch_next(err) and minimal_change.
Verify: order_preserved and db_err then next(err) and anchors_verbatim.
Answer target: emit_refactor and no_logic_drift and stop.
